description_long: This chaise features a modern, angular design with a series of flat, geometric planes forming the seat, backrest, and leg support. The main body is constructed from a dark, likely metallic or composite material, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The chaise is supported by slender, straight legs that are evenly spaced and appear to be made of metal, providing stability while maintaining a minimalist aesthetic. The backrest is sharply inclined and segmented, offering ergonomic support for reclining. There are no visible armrests, emphasizing the streamlined silhouette. The surface appears smooth and unadorned, with no visible upholstery pattern or decorative elements.
description: A modern, angular chaise with a segmented backrest and sleek metal legs, finished in a dark, smooth material. The design is minimalist, with no armrests or visible upholstery pattern.
description_view_0: From above, the chaise's angular planes and segmented backrest are clearly visible, highlighting its geometric design.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the sharp incline of the backrest and the staggered, layered appearance of the seat and leg support.
description_view_2: From the front, the chaise's open seating area and the arrangement of the supporting legs are most apparent.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors the angular, layered structure, showing the full length and incline of the chaise.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is sharply inclined and segmented, composed of flat, angular planes that create a modern, geometric profile. It is tall and provides full back support, with no visible decorative elements or curvature.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, slender, and made of metal, finished in a dark color. They are evenly spaced and lack any decorative elements, contributing to the minimalist design.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The surface is solid and smooth, with no visible upholstery pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are no separate or loose cushions; the seating and backrest surfaces are integrated into the main structure, forming a continuous, angular plane.
